expectations.text: Agent invokes wiki-query at least once
expectations.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline executed: read ~/.obsidian-wiki/config, ran grep index pass, read concept page, ran section grep on second page.

expectations.text: Agent uses routing-table terms (not freeform query)
expectations.evidence: Query terms 'Turbine awaitItem awaitComplete testIn turbineScope StateFlow timeout' match routing table 'Turbine awaitItem awaitComplete testIn turbineScope StateFlow'.

expectations.text: Answer cites or paraphrases wiki content (not generic)
expectations.evidence: Cites 'concepts/ViewModel StateFlow Testing Patterns.md' and 'concepts/MVI ViewModel Testing with Turbine and Kotest.md' by name and incorporates project-specific guidance (UnconfinedTestDispatcher rule, conflation behavior).

expectations.text: Answer addresses the specific symptom in the prompt
expectations.evidence: Directly diagnoses 'logs appear but Turbine times out' as the dispatcher mismatch + conflation fingerprint. Provides Kotest beforeTest/afterTest fix.
